protocol.name: xx_layer_chrome_v1

interface.name: xx_layer_chrome_manager_v1
interface.description: Allows clients to attach compositor-side chrome hints to layer-shell surfaces (blur tint, border, style).

entry.name: chrome_exists
entry.summary: the layer surface already has a chrome object

entry.name: invalid_role
entry.summary: the surface is not a layer-shell surface

request.name: get_layer_chrome

description.summary: create chrome metadata for a layer surface

request.description: Creates an xx_layer_chrome_v1 object for the given zwlr_layer_surface_v1.

interface.name: xx_layer_chrome_v1
interface.description: Double-buffered chrome hints applied on the next wl_surface.commit of the associated layer surface.
